cancellation_policy_text: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the day on which you or a third party named by you who is not the carrier took possession of the goods. To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us of your decision by means of a clear statement.
